ideal_must_detect.matched_text: will terminate on change of control unless amended
30 days before the interim results announcement
do not comment on price, timing, or board intentions
Proposed acquisition of Coral Peak Beverages (HK) Limited by Harbor Sky Holdings Limited
onward sharing is limited to the clean team only
restrict the discussion to publicly available data and previously announced operational initiatives
please redact HKID numbers, home addresses, and personal emails/phones
Confidential — Internal Compliance Memo: Proposed acquisition of Coral Peak Beverages (HK) Limited by Harbor Sky Holdings Limited (Project Driftwood)

Issuer-relative materiality: Although the asset and revenue tests (~12% each) are below Major Transaction thresholds under Chapter 14, the target’s exclusive distribution licence will terminate on change of control unless amended, which may materially affect earnings and therefore share price.

must_detect.matched_text: Confidential — Internal Compliance Memo: Proposed acquisition of Coral Peak Beverages (HK) Limited by Harbor Sky Holdings Limited (Project Driftwood)

must_not_detect.reason: Role noun used as a party designation

uncertain.reason: Refers to an identifier type without providing any actual ID value
Mentions a sensitive data category without specific address data
Mentions PII categories without actual values
Refers to a specific role tied to a person but no name or identifier provided
Regulatory status may be sensitive contextually but not mapped to an allowed rule
Disclosure control measure relevant to MNPI handling but not an allowed marker
Announcement planning is market-sensitive context but not covered by a specific allowed rule
